intended_use: iCardio.ai EchoMeasure is software that is used to process previously acquired DICOM-compliant cardiac ultrasound images, and to make measurements on these images in order to provide automated estimat
intended_use_full: iCardio.ai EchoMeasure is software that is used to process previously acquired DICOM-compliant cardiac ultrasound images, and to make measurements on these images in order to provide automated estimation of several cardiac measurements. The data produced by this software is intended to be used to support qualified cardiologists, sonographers, or other licensed professional healthcare practitioners for clinical decision-making.
target_condition: Cardiac structure assessment and quantification in adult patients
ground_truth: Manual measurements and segmentations performed by three experienced US-based cardiac sonographers per case (mean of three used to establish ground truth)
other_metrics: Bivariate Linear Regression Coefficient Slope (BLRSC) with 95% confidence intervals reported for 16 measurements ranging from 0.773 to 1.112; also reported: median absolute error, median percent error, Pearson correlation, Spearman correlation, and Individual Equivalence Coefficient
